plugins.prepareCmd: ./mvnw versions:set -DnewVersion=${nextRelease.version} && ./mvnw versions:commit && sed -i "s/^version: .*/version: ${nextRelease.version}/" backend/src/main/helm/acs-backend/Chart.yaml && sed -i "s/^appVersion: .*/appVersion: \"${nextRelease.version}\"/" backend/src/main/helm/acs-backend/Chart.yaml && sed -i "s/^version: .*/version: ${nextRelease.version}/" frontend/helm/frontend/Chart.yaml && sed -i "s/^appVersion: .*/appVersion: \"${nextRelease.version}\"/" frontend/helm/frontend/Chart.yaml && sed -i "s/^version: .*/version: ${nextRelease.version}/" helm/src/main/helm/Chart.yaml && sed -i "s/^appVersion: .*/appVersion: \"${nextRelease.version}\"/" helm/src/main/helm/Chart.yaml && sed -i "/- name: acs-backend/,/version:/ s/version: .*/version: ${nextRelease.version}/" helm/src/main/helm/Chart.yaml && sed -i "/- name: frontend/,/version:/ s/version: .*/version: ${nextRelease.version}/" helm/src/main/helm/Chart.yaml && ./mvnw -pl helm helm:dependency-update
